image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Did you know your cells have tiny factories? They're called ribosomes!
Context visual: These molecular machines read RNA, the instructions for building proteins.
Escalation visual: They grab amino acids, the building blocks of life, and piece them together.
Evidence visual: Each ribosome can create a protein in just minutes, crucial for cell function.
Payoff visual: Without ribosomes, our cells would be lifeless, unable to perform essential tasks.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into cell biology? Hit that follow button!
